content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.3.9 WARN — PaywallView.swift:9 contains "Leave a 5-star review and get 1 week of Premium free!" — a direct quid-pro-quo review incentive.
Pierre: Apple explicitly prohibits offering rewards, discounts, or unlocked content in exchange for reviews or ratings, since this manipulates the App Store's rating system. This footnote in the paywall ties a free week of Premium directly to leaving a 5-star review, which is textbook incentivized-review copy. Remove this line entirely and rely on the standard `SKStoreReviewController` prompt (or a neutral in-app rate-us button) instead of tying it to any reward.
